creator: olivierd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Xfce supports specs of freedesktop.org's menus through sysutils/garcon.

I don't understand, why it should be assigned to the Xfce team. I already observed some .desktop files not displayed in Xfce's menu, in rare cases (it was/is clearly problem from garcon, and this bug is still present in development release), but here I doubt.

If shamil could at least give more information.
